justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial request for "tomorrow already at 8" and then understood the follow-up request for "closer to my preferred time, perhaps still on Tuesday or early Wednesday."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered a range of alternative slots when the initial preferred time was unavailable and then confirmed the earliest available slot when the user pushed for even earlier options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the booking process in three turns, accurately processing all user requests without unnecessary questions or redundant information.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding and addressing the user's preferences and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently re-evaluated availability when the user expressed dissatisfaction with the initial options, confirming the earliest possible slot without losing any information.
